rationale: The most relevant development for Poland is the continued near-conclusion of a US-Iran deal, which could affect energy prices; all other headlines are distant or irrelevant to Polish daily life.

top_events.title: Iran-US deal reported near, Israel strikes Lebanon continue
top_events.summary: A US-Iran nuclear/peace deal remains close but unsigned, with Israeli strikes on Lebanon ongoing. If concluded, it could ease global energy prices relevant to Polish households.

top_events.title: Khamenei funeral announced, Iran leadership transition
top_events.summary: Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei's death and funeral mark a potential shift in Iranian politics, indirectly affecting the ongoing US-Iran deal and energy market stability relevant to Poland.

top_events.title: Switzerland votes on population cap referendum
top_events.summary: Switzerland's proposed 10-million population cap could affect EU labor mobility and migration patterns, with minor indirect relevance to Poland's labor market.
